risk.desc: Potential for structural failure if the combustion chamber dummy is not properly reinforced.
risk.mit: Ensure the combustion chamber dummy is reinforced with additional ribs or stiffeners.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal management issues if the cutaway window is not properly designed for passive cooling.
risk.mit: Verify the cutaway window design with thermal simulations to ensure proper cooling.

risk.desc: Risk of improper fit and function if the interfaces are not properly designed.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough interface checks and adjust as necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of strain damage to cables if harness strain relief is not properly designed.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have strain relief geometry and routing respects minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: Risk of mis-mating if connectors are not properly labeled or keyed.
risk.mit: Ensure all connectors are labeled and keyed to prevent mis-mating.

generated_parts.label: Fin Set x 4 Display Mock
generated_parts.spec: Primary_structure fin_set display mock with root tabs, alignment_key, bolt_circle_dummy, inspection callouts, no stability/performance claim

requirements.description: Primary structure fin_set display mock with root tabs, alignment_key, bolt_circle_dummy, inspection callouts, no stability/performance claim
Vehicle context: Saturn V-structured, Electron-class 2-stage smallsat launcher demonstrator
Suggested material: Al 7075 + CFRP + Inconel + ablative, process: LPBF + CFRP layup
Display-only flowpath: Tank, interstage, avionics, recovery, and engine-display modules are labeled educational/display-only
Interface evidence: Interstage and module joints show locating datums, bolt-circle dummies, and alignment keys so the mock stack assembles repeatably for review

requirements: Ensure visual inspection of assembly interfaces and components

verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present in the part_tree and geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each required evidence_feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
The mass estimate must be a numeric value.

verify.value: All features in the part_tree have corresponding geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each feature in the part_tree must have a corresponding geometry_op.

verify.value: All interfaces have reciprocal connection_type, DOF, and clearance_mm.
verify.rule: Interfaces must have reciprocal connection_type, DOF, and clearance_mm.

verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.

risk.desc: Tolerance mismatch between assembly_datum and adjacent interfaces.
risk.mit: Review and adjust tolerances to ensure compatibility.

risk.desc: Process limitations with LPBF and CFRP layup.

risk.desc: Unsafe overclaiming of structural integrity.
risk.mit: Verify and document structural integrity through analysis.
